name: @rustzen/zipper
description: Rust-based release packaging utility for repeatable zip archives

scripts.desktop:dev: cd apps/macos && bun run tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: cd apps/macos && bun run tauri build
scripts.ci: cargo build --locked && cargo test --locked && cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings && node scripts/verify-package.js

author: Bruce Dai <bruce@idaibin.dev>
